name: SCARED
description: Screen for Child Anxiety Related Emotional Disorders. Screens for anxiety disorders in children and adolescents.

questions.text: When I feel frightened, it is hard for me to breathe

options.label: Not true or hardly ever true

options.label: Not true or hardly ever true

options.label: Not true or hardly ever true

options.label: Not true or hardly ever true
